signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as a key catalyst for XRP's April 2026 surge, with the price gaining nearly 10% in the past week to around $1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1].
